title: gladiolus puberulus
intro: Gladiolus puberulus, also known as the hairy gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, characterized by its hairy stems, leaves, and flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine, where its roots and tubers are valued for their diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus puberulus include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to support the treatment of various health conditions such as arthritis and gout. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and tubers are typically dried, powdered, and used in teas, infusions, and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
